description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian with a slender build, depicted in a dynamic pose that suggests movement or walking. The figure has a distinct head with facial features, and the body is elongated with visible arms and legs, though the proportions appear stylized and somewhat abstract. The clothing is form-fitting, with a long-sleeved upper garment and long pants, and the shoes are simple and streamlined. The overall silhouette is clean, with minimal surface detail, and the figure appears to be unencumbered by accessories or carried items. The posture is upright, with one leg slightly forward, indicating a walking motion. The surface finish is matte, and the visible materials suggest a solid, non-reflective construction.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian in a walking pose, wearing fitted long-sleeve clothing and pants, with a clean, abstract silhouette and upright posture.
description_view_0: The figure is seen from the side, highlighting the elongated limbs and upright walking posture, with the head and facial features visible.
description_view_1: This angled view shows the front and side of the figure, emphasizing the forward stride and the form-fitting nature of the clothing.
description_view_2: From above, the head and shoulders are prominent, and the overall slimness of the figure is apparent, with the arms and legs extending outward.
description_view_3: The rear and side of the figure are visible, showing the back of the head and the streamlined back profile, with the legs in a walking stance.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve fitted top and straight-leg pants
